project_statement.project_purpose: Why is the event being planned?
project_statement.exclusions: E.g., what isn't part of this project?
project_statement.communication_needs: E.g., What groups will you communicate with and how often?
project_statement.acceptance_criteria: E.g., Do you need board approval on the plan? Budget approval?
project_statement.constraints: E.g., Are there other city-wide events during same time period?
project_statement.approvals: E.g., Who is the final approver for the project? Who else needs to be involved in approvals?
project_statement.project_scope: Define the boundaries: What specific activities, deliverables, and work are included?
project_statement.timeline_and_milestones: E.g., Start date, end date, major deadlines (vendor registration, ticket sales launch, setup day, event day)
project_statement.budget_and_resources: E.g., Total budget amount, funding sources, resource needs (staff, volunteers, equipment, venue costs)
project_statement.stakeholders: E.g., List key parties: sponsors, participants, community partners, vendors, attendees, local government
project_statement.roles_and_responsibilities: E.g., Who is the project manager? Who leads marketing, logistics, volunteer coordination, sponsorships?
project_statement.deliverables: E.g., What must be produced? (Event plan, marketing materials, vendor contracts, post-event report)
project_statement.success_metrics: E.g., How will you measure success? (Attendance numbers, funds raised, satisfaction scores, media mentions)
project_statement.risks_and_assumptions: E.g., What could go wrong? (Weather, low attendance) What are you assuming? (Permits approved, venue available)
